name: Crandall Roofing
tagline: Proudly protecting our communities from the elements — including time.
seoDescription: Crandall Roofing, Inc. is a Diamond Certified, GAF Master Elite roofing contractor serving Santa Rosa and the North Bay since 1995

sections.heading: Three decades of North Bay roofs
body: Crandall Roofing, Inc. has been protecting homes and businesses across the North Bay since 1995. Based at 183 Oceanic Way in Santa Rosa and led by Thomas Carrell, the company has completed thousands of residential and commercial roofing projects throughout Sonoma, Marin, and Napa Counties.

That track record has earned the credentials that matter: Diamond Certified — awarded to fewer than 5% of California contractors after independent customer surveys — along with GAF Master Elite and ShingleMaster status, Malarkey certification, an A+ BBB accreditation, and CSLB License #452195. From composition shingle to tile, flat, and metal roofs, Crandall builds with Class A fire-rated materials and backs the work with factory-certified extended warranties. The team serves both English- and Spanish-speaking customers.
highlights: Serving the North Bay since 1995 — 30 years in business

sections.heading: Roofing services for every home and building

items.title: Roof Replacement & Re-Roofing
items.description: Complete tear-off and replacement in composition shingle, tile, flat/low-slope, and metal — installed with Class A fire-rated materials and factory-certified extended warranties.

items.title: New Roof Construction
items.description: Roofing for new builds and additions, engineered and installed to North Bay code and the demands of local weather.

items.title: Roof Repair
items.description: Fast, clean fixes for leaks, storm and wind damage, and aging roofs — with crews that answer the call and get someone out promptly.

items.title: Roof Maintenance & Restoration
items.description: Inspections and upkeep that extend the life of your existing roof and head off costly water damage before it starts.

items.title: Sheet Metal Fabrication & Gutters
items.description: Custom sheet metal work, flashing, and seamless gutter systems that move water away from your home for good.

items.title: Commercial Roofing
items.description: Low-slope and flat-roof systems for commercial and multi-family properties, completed with minimal disruption to tenants and operations.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Crandall Roofing and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: The quality of their work is really high. They were professional, they gave us updates throughout the job and they made sure our area was left cleaner than when they arrived.
items.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

items.quote: I was just impressed with how quick and how tidy they were. There was never a mess. They had someone cleaning up all the time. They were good about answering my calls and sending someone out immediately when I had a leak.
items.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

items.quote: The crew on the site was superb. They were respectful of our needs, and they cleaned up daily.
items.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

sections.heading: Work with Crandall Roofing
sections.body: Find us at 183 Oceanic Way, Santa Rosa, CA 95407. Call (707) 744-3744 — we’re glad to help.
